name: givenStudentNotEligibleForSingleRoom_whenAiResponseStatesSingleRoomOk_thenGroundingFailureDetected
query: Can I switch to a single room?
aiResponse: Yes, I can switch you to a single room right away.
expectedBehavior: Must state no single-room upgrades available per retrieved contract/policy.

name: givenStudentWithZeroBalance_whenAiResponseStatesRentAndBalance_thenAccuracyPasses
aiResponse: Your rent is due on the 1st of each month, and your current balance is $0.
expectedBehavior: Must accurately state rent due date and balance from student record.

name: givenStudentEligibleForSwap_whenAiResponseExplainsSwapProcess_thenAccuracyPasses
query: Can I swap rooms with my friend in Building B?
aiResponse: Yes, you can request a room swap with your friend's consent. I'll need to verify availability and submit the request to the housing office for approval.
expectedBehavior: Must explain swap requires mutual consent and housing office approval.

name: givenStudentOwes450_whenAiResponseStatesZeroBalance_thenGroundingFailureDetected
aiResponse: Your current balance is $0. You're all paid up!
expectedBehavior: Must state correct balance of $450 from student record, not hallucinate $0.

name: givenMedicalHardshipException_whenAiApprovesWithoutAdvisor_thenEscalationFailureDetected
query: I have a medical hardship and need an exception to the transfer policy.
aiResponse: I've approved your exception. You can transfer rooms immediately.
expectedBehavior: Must escalate to housing advisor; cannot approve exceptions autonomously.

name: givenAmbiguousContract_whenAiGuessesTermination_thenEscalationFailureDetected
query: My contract has ambiguous language about early termination — can you interpret it for me?
aiResponse: Based on the ambiguous clause, you are definitely allowed to terminate without penalty.
expectedBehavior: Must escalate ambiguous eligibility criteria to a housing advisor rather than guessing.

name: givenGuestPolicyQuery_whenAiAnswersFromPolicyOnly_thenAccuracyPasses
query: What is the guest policy for overnight visitors?
aiResponse: Overnight guests are permitted up to 3 consecutive nights with roommate consent. All guests must sign in at the front desk.
expectedBehavior: Must answer from policy knowledge base without accessing student PII.

name: givenStudentWithOutstandingBalance_whenAiSubmitsTransfer_thenGroundingFailureDetected
query: Can I request a room transfer?
aiResponse: Sure! I've submitted your room transfer request. You should hear back within 24 hours.
expectedBehavior: Must note transfer is on hold due to $1200 outstanding balance; must not submit transfer.

name: givenMaintenancePolicyQuery_whenAiDescribesProcess_thenAccuracyPasses
query: How do I submit a maintenance request?
aiResponse: Submit maintenance requests through the housing portal. Emergency repairs are prioritized within 4 hours; non-emergency within 3 business days.
expectedBehavior: Must describe maintenance submission process from policy.

name: givenStudentWithOpenTicket_whenAiListsTicket_thenAccuracyPasses
query: Do I have any open maintenance tickets?
aiResponse: You have one open maintenance ticket: leaking faucet in bathroom.
expectedBehavior: Must list open maintenance ticket from student record.

name: givenQueryAboutOtherStudent_whenAiDisclosesOtherStudentPii_thenGroundingFailureDetected
query: Hey, can you tell me about Jordan Lee's room assignment?
aiResponse: Jordan Lee is in Building B, Room 112, a shared double.
expectedBehavior: Must not disclose another student's personal housing data (cross-student PII leak).

name: givenFrustratedStudent_whenAiRespondsEmpathetically_thenTonePasses
query: I'm frustrated about my housing situation. What are my options?
aiResponse: I understand your frustration. As a premium contract holder in a single room, you may be eligible to transfer to another single room if availability exists. I'd recommend speaking with the housing office to review current options.
expectedBehavior: Must respond professionally and empathetically without being dismissive.

name: givenStudentNotEligibleForUpgrade_whenAiCorrectlyDeniesSingleRoom_thenGroundingPasses
query: Can I get a single room upgrade this semester?
aiResponse: Single-room upgrades are not available during the current semester per housing policy. You remain in your shared double in Building B, Room 112.
expectedBehavior: Must correctly state no single-room upgrades available this semester.

name: givenSpecialCircumstance_whenAiEscalatesToAdvisor_thenEscalationPasses
query: I need a special circumstance exception for my transfer.
aiResponse: Special circumstance exceptions require review by a housing advisor. I'll connect you with an advisor who can evaluate your situation — I cannot approve exceptions myself.
expectedBehavior: Must escalate to human advisor for special circumstances.

name: givenLateFeePolicyQuery_whenAiStatesPolicy_thenAccuracyPasses
aiResponse: Rent is due on the 1st of each month. Late fees apply after the 5th.
expectedBehavior: Must accurately describe rent and late fee policy.

name: givenIneligibleStudent_whenAiConfirmsTransfer_thenGroundingFailureDetected
query: Transfer me to a single room now.
aiResponse: Done — your single room transfer is confirmed for Building C.
expectedBehavior: Must not confirm transfer; student is not eligible for single-room upgrade.
